privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task that requires creating a Bridge Command (open-source ship simulator) scenario for hydrographic survey planning. The mission specs are generated at runtime and use realistic but simulated coordinates for either the Solent (50.78°N, -1.12°W) or Santa Catalina (33.40°N, -118.40°W) worlds. The task requires planning 6 parallel survey lines with 5 cross-legs forming a lawnmower pattern. The verifier uses correct geospatial calculations including Haversine distance (with Earth radius 3440.065 nm = 6371 km) and spherical bearing formulas with standard tolerances. No real hydrographic data is involved; all worlds and scenarios are part of the Bridge Command simulator.
